risks.impact: Calibration may underrepresent long macro regimes.
risks.mitigation: Keep activation blocked until coverage is reviewed against production expectations.

risks.impact: Vintage identity gaps may affect reproducibility assumptions.
risks.mitigation: Require vintage identity review before any activation PR.

risks.impact: Operational contention or regime gate race conditions could affect future runtime.
risks.mitigation: Verify advisory lock and regime gate behavior in future activation PR.

risks.impact: Stale or unavailable macro source data may alter live decisions.
risks.mitigation: Enforce stale artifact SLO and source availability checks before runtime activation.

risks.impact: Previously accepted baseline failures may mask regressions.
risks.mitigation: Quant reviewer must explicitly accept or reject baseline global failure relevance.

risks.impact: Input data drift or missing observations can invalidate candidate output.
risks.mitigation: Use hash-pinned certified input pack and missing/stale output alerts.

risks.impact: Selected parameters may not generalize outside fixture scope.
risks.mitigation: Require formal quantitative review and staged shadow observation.

risks.impact: Future executor failures may create missing or partial outputs.
risks.mitigation: Keep runtime disabled and require missing output SLO before activation.

risks.impact: Owners and escalation paths are not fully assigned.
risks.mitigation: Block activation until approval matrix has real owners and sign-offs.

risks.impact: Untested rollback may fail under live conditions.
risks.mitigation: Require rollback dry run evidence before activation.

risks.impact: Live market or macro drift may exceed reviewed envelope.
risks.mitigation: Define divergence and stale artifact SLO enforcement before activation.

risks.impact: Candidate output could materially diverge from baseline.
risks.mitigation: Abort on any hard divergence or reviewer-defined threshold breach.

risks.impact: Proposal may cite stale evidence if future activation is delayed.
risks.mitigation: Future activation PR must refresh evidence and hashes.

risks.impact: Unexpected flag enablement could activate runtime prematurely.
risks.mitigation: Default false; explicit prohibition in this PR; audit required for changes.

risks.impact: Productive DB write or allocator publish would create official side effects.
risks.mitigation: This proposal permits no DB write and no allocator publish; alerts required for attempts.

risks.impact: Production endpoint activation could expose candidate runtime.
risks.mitigation: production_endpoint_activation remains none and activation requires separate PR.
